overall.description: A nighttime walk through a cyberpunk cityscape featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic vending machines, and towering holographic billboards. The camera follows a character walking along sidewalks past palm trees and automated vendors, transitioning through an open lot with a view of a massive purple-lit stadium structure, before navigating through pedestrians and crossing a street intersection. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced neon lighting and detailed cyberpunk environmental design characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a neon-lit cyberpunk sidewalk at night, with the camera moving past a row of colorful vending machines on the right. A large CHOOH2 billboard towers in the distance while palm trees line the left side of the concrete path. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction, and a pedestrian in a green top walks ahead of the camera.

tall modern buildings with glass facades and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character turns right off the sidewalk into a wide open area with dirt and grass ground cover. A massive purple-lit stadium dome becomes visible in the distance, dominating the skyline with its neon glow. The CHOOH2 billboard and palm trees recede to the left as the camera moves toward the futuristic cityscape ahead.

segments.scene_description: Turning left onto a concrete sidewalk, the path is lined with dense palm trees and street lighting. The purple stadium remains visible to the left while the camera approaches an intersection ahead. Pedestrian density increases, with a notable figure in a white top and red skirt walking ahead, and trash bins appear on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection while vehicles wait at the traffic light
turns slightly to navigate around pedestrians on the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection, navigating through pedestrians and observing waiting traffic

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the intersection and steps onto the crosswalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. A black truck waits at the red traffic light on the right as the camera crosses the asphalt street. The surroundings feature futuristic commercial buildings with neon signage, and the camera continues onto the opposite sidewalk, leaving the purple stadium behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that transitions from a quiet sidewalk into a wide open plaza before merging into a crowded city intersection. It begins by gliding past colorful vending machines and palm trees under the glow of a towering CHOOH2 billboard, following a pedestrian in a green top. As the camera turns right, the concrete gives way to a dirt and grass lot where a massive purple-lit stadium dome emerges to dominate the skyline. The scene then shifts back onto a paved path lined with dense palms and trash bins, moving toward an intersection as the crowd thickens around a figure in a white top and red skirt. Finally, the camera steps onto a crosswalk and navigates through pedestrian traffic past a waiting black truck, leaving the stadium behind as it enters a dense corridor of futuristic commercial buildings and neon signage.
